raw_consumer_statement: Macy 's card, I opened this card on around XXXX of XXXX I purchased for items my credit limit was {$300.00} dollars, so I asked them how much money did they receive from me they told me over {$800.00} so I asked what am I paying for .I made 1 purchase in XXXX for XXXX and was making my payments they couldn't explain why I have still have an outstanding bill
